chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 155 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 27.03.2025 Mr. Ishfaque Ahmed Abro, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kuber, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Ghulam Murtaza Soomro, Private Secretary to Chairman, BISE, Sukkur is present and files statement on behalf of Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate along with certain documents, which is taken on record. None present for the petitioner nor any intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing. The absence on the part of the petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that they are no more interested to pursue the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
